description: Text output formatter: tab-separated values, lists expanded one item per line
notes: 15 tests, matches AWS CLI output for STS/DynamoDB/S3

description: Table output formatter: ASCII table with box-drawing characters, headers from shape member names
notes: 20 tests, vertical and horizontal tables, similar structure to AWS CLI

description: --debug flag prints request/response details to stderr
notes: Already implemented in prior sessions - debug logging in all 5 protocol dispatchers

description: Proper error messages for common failures: invalid credentials, no region, unknown service, unknown operation
notes: 11 tests covering all error paths: no region, unknown service, unknown operation, credential failures for all 5 protocols

description: Help text generation: raws <service> help lists operations, raws <service> <operation> help shows parameters
notes: Lists operations in columns, operation help shows description and parameter list with types and required markers
Added --no-paginate flag to GlobalArgs, integrated with pagination loop

description: Automatic pagination using paginators-1.json: follow next tokens until all pages retrieved
notes: 26 tests, loads paginators-1.json, merges pages, handles multi-token and IsTruncated

description: --cli-input-json support: read operation input from a JSON file
--generate-cli-skeleton output: generate JSON skeleton of operation input shape
--query flag with JMESPath expression to filter/transform output
raws configure command: interactive credential setup writing to ~/.aws/credentials and ~/.aws/config
JSON output matches aws CLI exactly: same key ordering, same indentation (4 spaces)
